SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO MAR-15-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ERIKA LINDSEY IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM.
